Event: Royal Challenge - Season 43
Event Date: 01/11/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: A260
Dream Reader

Triggers: 3 sec

Captivity in Thorns
4 random enemy units have all their stats reduced by 40% for 4; all shields, damage-reducing and damage-blocking effects are removed from them. The ability's targets become entangled in a spiky vine: they can't move or use any abilities (except those granted by the equipped set) for 4 sec. The entangled enemies also have exhaustion applied to them every second. They take physical damage equal to 180% of the artifact owner's attack every second. When an enemy unit is exhausted, their damage and attack speed are reduced by 15%. The exhaustion lasts 4 sec. Stacks up to 4 times.

Requirements: 90-100
